creator: kirk@strauser.com
text:
On Thursday 19 October 2006 10:10 am, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of shells/bash-completion,
>
> Please note that PR ports/104571 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104571

I approve this patch.
-- 
Kirk Strauser
